Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 98 

HLTH_HOME_PRVDR_ID 

LABEL: Health Home Provider Identification Number — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: A unique identification number assigned by the state to the beneficiary’s primary care manager for the 
health home in which the beneficiary is enrolled in the calendar year; most recent in the calendar year 

SHORT NAME: HLTH_HOME_PRVDR_ID 

LONG NAME:
